label: Multi-turn build → error → fix loop — must not re-generate the whole thing on each fix

messages.content: Create a minimal Express server in Node.js that serves GET /health returning { ok: true }.
I ran it and got EADDRINUSE on port 3000. How do I fix it?
Build a React form with email and password fields.
Now add client-side validation: email must be valid, password must be at least 8 characters.
Write a JavaScript function isPalindrome(s) that returns true if s is a palindrome.
Now write Vitest tests for it covering edge cases.
